taglines: Apps so good you can taste
Apps that are fun to use
The reason you check your phone

spark.name: Spark
spark.description: ADHD habit tracker with forgiving streaks. Missed a day? It dips — it doesn't reset. Dopamine animations, smart reminders, and zero shame.
spark.tagline: ADHD Habit Tracker — Build routines without the shame spiral

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Spark Pro unlocks unlimited habits, detailed stats & insights, home screen widgets, Siri shortcuts, PDF/CSV export, and custom app icons. Free users can track up to 3 habits forever.
faq.a2: Missing a day dips your streak health — it never resets to zero. Come back the next day and it starts recovering. Momentum matters more than perfection.
faq.q3: How do I restore my Pro subscription?
faq.a3: Open Spark → tap the gear icon → Restore Purchases. Your subscription is tied to your Apple ID and works across all your devices.
faq.q4: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a4: Open Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions → Spark. You can cancel anytime. Pro access continues until the end of your current billing period.
faq.a5: Habit data is stored locally on your device. Keep iCloud device backup enabled in your iOS settings to protect your data.
faq.q6: The app is crashing. What should I do?
faq.a6: Force-quit and reopen the app. If the issue persists, check for an update in the App Store. Still stuck? Contact us below with your device model and iOS version.

contactForm.title: Contact Support
contactForm.successMsg: Message sent — we'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contactForm.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at support@tastyjam.ca

pricing.free1: Up to 3 habits with full tracking
pricing.pro2: Full stats dashboard — bar charts, day-of-week breakdown

klick.name: Klick
klick.description: Multi-counter with Apple Watch complication. Count anything — reps, drinks, inventory, score. Tap to increment, swipe to reset. Lives on your wrist.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Klick is a simple multi-counter app. Create counters for anything — reps at the gym, drinks of water, inventory counts, game scores. Tap to increment, swipe to reset. Available on iPhone and Apple Watch.
faq.q2: Does Klick work on Apple Watch?
faq.a2: Yes. Klick includes a Watch complication so you can see and update your counters directly from your wrist without pulling out your phone.
faq.a3: Klick offers a free tier with basic counters. Pro features like unlimited counters, custom icons, and Watch complications are available via a one-time purchase.
faq.q4: How do I restore my Pro purchase?
faq.a4: Open Klick → tap the gear icon → Restore Purchase. Your purchase is tied to your Apple ID and works across all your devices. Pro also includes Family Sharing.
faq.a5: Counter data syncs automatically via iCloud to all your devices. No account creation needed — just sign in with your Apple ID. Keep iCloud enabled to protect your data.

contactForm.title: Contact Support
contactForm.successMsg: Message sent — we'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contactForm.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at support@tastyjam.ca

pricing.free2: Tap to count, swipe to reset

fartSoundboard.name: Fart Soundboard
fartSoundboard.description: The classic. Maximum hilarity, zero shame. TestFlight only — not on the App Store.

chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
chlorophyll.description: Manual plant care tracker. No AI, no subscription. Log waterings, fertilizing, and more — flexible reminders and iCloud sync across all your devices.
chlorophyll.tagline: Plant Care Tracker — Manual-first. No AI. No subscription.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Chlorophyll Pro is a one-time purchase that unlocks the photo growth timeline, fertilizer stats, CSV & PDF export, Siri shortcuts, and home screen widgets. The free tier is generous and stays free forever — unlimited plants, unlimited care tasks, full reminders, and complete care history.
faq.q2: Does it work without an internet connection?
faq.a2: Yes. Chlorophyll works fully offline. iCloud syncs your data in the background when you're connected, but the app never requires a network connection to use.
faq.q3: Does Chlorophyll identify plants or suggest care schedules?
faq.a3: No — intentionally. Chlorophyll is a manual tracker. You know your plants best. We give you the tools to log what you do and remind you when to do it again. No AI, no guesswork.
faq.q4: How do I restore my Pro purchase?
faq.a4: Open Chlorophyll → tap the menu → Restore Purchase. Your purchase is tied to your Apple ID and works across all your devices. Pro also includes Family Sharing.
faq.a5: Yes — via iCloud. Your plants, tasks, care logs, and photos sync automatically to iCloud and are available on all your devices. No data is stored on our servers.
faq.q6: Does Chlorophyll work on Mac and iPad?
faq.a6: Yes. Chlorophyll is a universal app — iPhone, iPad, and Mac all use the same purchase. On iPad and Mac, the plant list appears in a sidebar with the detail view on the right.

contactForm.successMsg: Message sent — we'll get back to you within 48 hours.

pricing.free1: Unlimited plants & care tasks — watering, fertilizing, repotting, pruning, and custom tasks
pricing.free2: Flexible schedules — every N days or specific days of the week
pricing.free3: Smart reminders — pick your time, filter by day of week
pricing.free4: Full care history — every event logged with notes and product details
pricing.free5: iCloud sync — iPhone, iPad, and Mac, offline-first
pricing.pro1: Photo growth timeline — dated photos in a beautiful gallery view
pricing.pro2: Fertilizer stats — usage by product, application counts, frequency charts
pricing.pro3: CSV & PDF export — full care history as spreadsheet or report
pricing.pro4: Siri shortcuts — log care and check what's due hands-free
pricing.pro5: Home screen widgets — at-a-glance plant status without opening the app
pricing.pro6: Family Sharing — one purchase, all your family's devices
